aliases: tooth like growth in the jaw
symptom: a front tooth that refused to come in long after all the others had arrived
hook: a little sack in the jaw was crammed with dozens of tiny malformed teeth
whatYouSee: A small pocket in the jaw is packed with dozens of tiny tooth shaped pieces blocking a normal tooth from coming through.
whyItMatters: This bundle of mini teeth is a harmless growth but it physically blocks the real tooth from erupting so it has to come out.
treatment: The whole cluster is scooped out which usually lets the blocked tooth finally erupt on its own.
takeaway: The body can grow a whole pocket of spare teeth.

laypersonQuestion: How many tiny teeth do you count in there?
seedHint: Look at that little sack and ask yourself: one tooth gone wrong or many?

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a front tooth that refused to come in long after all the others had arrived.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a little sack in the jaw was crammed with dozens of tiny malformed teeth.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Compound odontoma

👀 What you see:
A small pocket in the jaw is packed with dozens of tiny tooth shaped pieces blocking a normal tooth from coming through.

🦴 Why it matters:
This bundle of mini teeth is a harmless growth but it physically blocks the real tooth from erupting so it has to come out.

💊 Treatment:

The whole cluster is scooped out which usually lets the blocked tooth finally erupt on its own.
